home.heroSubtitle: Premium cables built for speed, safety and uncompromising performance.
home.cablesDesc: Power Delivery up to 100W — premium speed and durability.
home.adaptersDesc: iOS & Android compatibility — fast charging, compact design.
home.bundlesDesc: Complete kit — everything you need in one NOVRA pack.
home.newsletterDesc: Get exclusive offers and NOVRA news.
home.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in NOVRA products.

affiliate.title: NOVRA Affiliate Program
affiliate.subtitle: Earn commission for every sale generated through your unique link.

usb-c-100w.title: NOVRA UltraCharge 100W
usb-c-100w.subtitle: USB-C to USB-C Premium Cable
usb-c-100w.description: High-performance cable with intelligent E-Mark chip. Ideal for MacBook Pro, laptops, iPads and latest-generation smartphones requiring massive Power Delivery.

usb-c-pro-240w.title: NOVRA HyperPower 240W
usb-c-pro-240w.subtitle: Next-Gen PD 3.1 USB-C Cable
usb-c-pro-240w.description: Future-ready. Supports the new USB Power Delivery 3.1 standard up to 240W. Built for graphics workstations and the most powerful gaming laptops.

usb-a-c-100w.title: NOVRA Hybrid 100W
usb-a-c-100w.subtitle: USB-A to USB-C Fast Charge
usb-a-c-100w.description: The perfect bridge between classic USB-A chargers and modern USB-C devices. Supports Quick Charge and SuperCharge fast-charging protocols.

usb-c-lightning-pd.title: NOVRA AppleCharge Pro
usb-c-lightning-pd.subtitle: USB-C to Lightning Fast Charge
usb-c-lightning-pd.description: Premium high-speed cable, fully compatible with Apple Power Delivery. Charges iPhone from 0% to 50% in just 30 minutes with a PD adapter.

usb-a-lightning-classic.title: NOVRA Lightning Classic
usb-a-lightning-classic.subtitle: USB-A to Lightning Durable Cable
usb-a-lightning-classic.description: The classic connection, optimized for extreme durability. Reinforced internal structure prevents breakage at joints — perfect for daily use at home or in-car with Apple CarPlay.

usb-c-lightning-flex.title: NOVRA FlexLink Nova
usb-c-lightning-flex.subtitle: USB-C to Lightning MagSafe Ready
usb-c-lightning-flex.description: Ultra-slim premium adapter optimized for MagSafe wireless charging and simultaneous Power Delivery. Anodized alloy connectors and medical-grade silicone cable.

incarcator-gan-65w.title: NOVRA GaN Nova 65W
incarcator-gan-65w.subtitle: Triple-Port Fast Wall Charger + Cable
incarcator-gan-65w.description: Ultra-compact wall charger powered by GaN technology. Three smart ports can simultaneously charge a MacBook Pro, iPhone and earbuds at maximum speed.

incarcator-auto-metal.title: NOVRA DriveSpeed 45W
incarcator-auto-metal.subtitle: Dual USB-C Metal Car Charger + Cable
incarcator-auto-metal.description: Built entirely from premium aluminum alloy for optimal heat dissipation. Two independent USB-C ports for ultra-fast charging on the road.

bundle-travel-pack.title: NOVRA TravelPack Duo
bundle-travel-pack.subtitle: GaN Travel Charger + Braided Cable Kit
bundle-travel-pack.description: Complete mobility set: compact GaN charger with premium braided cable. Ideal for office, travel or as a gift.
